title: nmap Scan Configuration
description: Configure an nmap scan. Required: target. Most users want scanProfile=standard and the default port range.

target.title: Target
target.description: IP address, hostname, CIDR range, or space-separated list. Examples: 8.8.8.8 | scanme.nmap.org | 192.168.1.0/24 | 10.0.0.1 10.0.0.2. You MUST be authorized to scan the target.

scanProfile.title: Scan Profile
scanProfile.description: Preset combinations. quick = top 100 ports fast | standard = top 1000 + service detection | thorough = all 65535 ports + scripts | web = web ports + HTTP scripts | vuln = vulnerability NSE scripts. Pick 'custom' to use the raw flags below.

ports.title: Ports
ports.description: Port specification (only used when scanProfile is 'custom'). Examples: 22 | 1-1000 | 22,80,443 | top-100 | top-1000 | all. Leave empty for nmap default.
ports.sectionDescription: Used when scanProfile=custom (or to override profile defaults).

scanTechnique.title: Scan Technique
scanTechnique.description: TCP connect (-sT) is the only technique that works without root. Apify containers run unprivileged so SYN/UDP/etc are not available.
enumTitles: TCP Connect (-sT) — only option on Apify unprivileged sandbox

serviceDetection.title: Service & Version Detection (-sV)
serviceDetection.description: Identify what service is running on each open port and its version. Adds 10-60s per host.

defaultScripts.title: Default NSE Scripts (-sC)
defaultScripts.description: Run the default category of NSE scripts (~100 useful scripts: banner grabbing, SSL info, HTTP titles, etc.).

customScripts.title: Custom NSE Scripts (--script)
customScripts.description: Comma-separated NSE script names or categories. Examples: http-title,ssl-cert | vuln | http-* | safe and discovery.

timing.title: Timing Template
timing.description: T0 paranoid (slow, IDS-evading) ... T5 insane (very fast, may miss results). T4 is the sweet spot for most internet targets.

skipHostDiscovery.title: Skip Host Discovery (-Pn)
skipHostDiscovery.description: Assume host is up, skip ping probe. Recommended — Apify network often blocks ICMP.

openPortsOnly.title: Show Only Open Ports (--open)
openPortsOnly.description: Suppress closed/filtered ports in the output. Cleaner dataset.

customArgs.title: Custom nmap Arguments (advanced)
customArgs.description: Raw nmap flags appended to the command. Use with care — must be valid nmap flags. Example: --max-retries 2 --host-timeout 30s

timeout.title: Subprocess Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Hard kill nmap after this many seconds. Default 1800 (30 min).
